test_priorities.reason: This endpoint is used to get all employees and is a fundamental part of the API.
This endpoint is used to create a new employee and should be tested after the GET endpoint.
This endpoint is used to get a single employee by ID and relies on the existence of employees created by the POST endpoint.
This endpoint is used to delete an employee and should be tested after the GET and POST endpoints.
This endpoint is used to update an employee and relies on the existence of employees created by the POST endpoint.
